name: MUSE-Autoskill: 技能全生命周期(创建/记忆/管理/评估/精炼)的自进化Agent
content: 五阶段统一生命周期: creation(按需合成SKILL.md+scripts/+tests/) → memory(per-skill跨任务经验累积) → management(skill catalog检索) → evaluation(unit tests+runtime feedback) → refinement(经验反馈迭代) | SkillsBench 85.24% vs 人类技能81.17% (自创技能超越人类！); 跨agent transfer到Hermes达51.90% (vs Codex/Claude-created); SkillsBench+SkillLearnBench上超越Hermes/Codex/Claude Code | skill-level memory (per-skill跨任务经验) + unit tests bundled with skill 是MUSE独到之处。skill应是'long-lived, experience-aware, testable assets'
summary: 技能体系·自进化技能全生命周期 — 完美对齐'技能自改进+生命周期'真缺口
key_insights: 五阶段统一生命周期: creation(按需合成SKILL.md+scripts/+tests/) → memory(per-skill跨任务经验累积) → management(skill catalog检索) → evaluation(unit tests+runtime feedback) → refinement(经验反馈迭代)
SkillsBench 85.24% vs 人类技能81.17% (自创技能超越人类！); 跨agent transfer到Hermes达51.90% (vs Codex/Claude-created); SkillsBench+SkillLearnBench上超越Hermes/Codex/Claude Code
skill-level memory (per-skill跨任务经验) + unit tests bundled with skill 是MUSE独到之处。skill应是'long-lived, experience-aware, testable assets'
xihe_relevance: 曦和evolution_engine.skill_registry目前缺：①unit test bundling ②per-skill memory(累积式经验) ③skill-level runtime evaluation。已落地agent_skills自审(7-17融合)是从Skill自审端点出发，MUSE是从技能资产本身出发——两个视角互补 | 融合落点: C. 补充 → evolution_engine.skill_unit_test_runner + skill_per_skill_memory (精化'技能=长期资产'的设计)
